name: Configure questionnaire with 'Complete questionnaire without warning' and verify 'Disable' action is executed when Question condition is triggered on 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' and check Questionnaire 'Set Value to Variable' action

Navigate to risk management and link questionnaire
Wait for selector getByText('Questionnaire_1777546833503 Link').getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'ql._id' })
Open questionnaire and verify all questions visible
verify disable action executed when question condition is met
Verify complete without warning setting applied

Expect "not toBeVisible" locator('span').filter({ hasText: 'This is the last page of the questionnaire. Not all pages are completed. Do you want to finish the questionnaire and complete all pages?' })
verify set value to variable action executed when questionnaire condition is met
Verify Indicators added Succesfully and verify indicator level
